jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ICAT - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
